name: russ-patchstory
description: PatchStory — turn a PR or diff into an interactive, human-readable walkthrough, with your coding agent authoring the narrative.

plugins.name: patchstory
plugins.description: Turn a pull request or local change into an interactive PR walkthrough. The agent authors the story (chapters with intent, risk, reviewer questions, verification steps); patchstory renders it as a self-contained .html with secrets redacted and opens it.
